pr_text:
## Title: Fix incorrect channel estimates pointer in nr_ulsch_mmse_2layers call

### Summary
Correct a parameter error in the uplink demodulation module where the wrong channel estimates pointer was passed to the MMSE receiver for 2-layer MIMO processing. The `inner_rx` function incorrectly used `chFext` instead of `pusch_vars->ul_ch_estimates_ext` when calling `nr_ulsch_mmse_2layers`, causing the equalizer to operate on stale or incorrect channel state information. This fix ensures proper chann
